title: ModelResidency
description: Point-in-time evidence that a governed model reference is available, loaded, warm, pinned, evictable, or unavailable on an Agent Machine.

specVersion.description: Spec version of this document, e.g. "2.1.0".

machineRef.description: Agent Machine URN where residency was observed.

modelCarryRef.description: SourceOSModelCarryRef URN for the governed model/service reference.

providerRef.description: InferenceProvider URN serving or expected to serve the model.

quantization.description: Quantization or precision label when known, such as q4_k_m, int8, fp16, or null.

bytesOnDisk.description: Observed model bytes on local storage, or null when unknown.

cacheTier.description: Primary cache tier currently holding the model or null when unknown.

evidenceRefs.description: Evidence URNs or content hashes for probe output, checksums, and provider state.
